description: fpdf2 is a simple, fast PDF generation library for Python. Useful for report generation.

documentation.example: from fpdf import FPDF; pdf = FPDF(); pdf.add_page(); pdf.set_font('helvetica', size=12); pdf.cell(text='hi'); pdf.output('out.pdf')

metadata.example: from fpdf import FPDF; pdf = FPDF(); pdf.add_page(); pdf.set_font('helvetica', size=12); pdf.cell(text='hi'); pdf.output('out.pdf')

name: fpdf2
